description: Left half: brand story, testimonial, feature highlights. Right half: auth form. Classic SaaS split.

css_layout_rules..auth-brand-panel: display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; padding: 4rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
css_layout_rules..auth-form-panel: display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; padding: 4rem; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;
css_layout_rules..auth-form: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem; margin: 2rem 0;
